global_description: Large feline with a muscular, elongated body, covered in short tawny fur. Males have a distinctive mane of darker, longer hair around the head and neck. The face is broad with a prominent nose and sharp eyes. The tail is long with a tuft of darker fur at the end.

part_details.mane: Thick, dark hair encircling the head and neck of males
part_details.body: Elongated, muscular with short tawny fur
part_details.face: Broad with a prominent nose and sharp eyes
part_details.tail: Long with a tuft of darker fur at the tip
